title: schismus barbatus var. perennis
intro: Schismus barbatus var. perennis, also known as the Schismus grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Schismus barbatus var. perennis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing irritated skin. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and effects.
